ham.subject: Your Account Transaction Alert – Action Required
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

We have detected a recent transaction on your account. Please review the details below:

Transaction ID: 987654321
Date: 2026-04-06
Amount: $125.00
Merchant: Example Store

If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact us immediately.

Thank you,
Bank Customer Support Team

spam.subject: Immediate Action Required: Payroll Update – HR Notice
spam.body:
Dear Employee,

Due to recent regulatory changes, your payroll has been temporarily suspended pending verification. Please confirm your personal details and payroll information by visiting <URL> within the next 24 hours. Failure to comply may result in delayed salary disbursement.

For assistance, contact the HR Help Desk.

Thank you for your cooperation,
HR Department
